action_text: Click empty space in the list area to dismiss the popover
rationale: The global search context popover is obstructing interactions; clicking on blank space in the list should dismiss it so I can use the list filter to find the report.

action_text: Press Escape to close the popover
rationale: If clicking outside doesn’t close the popover, pressing Escape should dismiss it, allowing me to interact with the list controls.

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter for the reports list
rationale: To quickly locate the report by title on this page, enabling the list filter is ideal so I can filter by “Title = Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the report list by title
rationale: Sorting by Title may make it easier to scan for “Incidents by agent” in the list if filtering isn’t available.

action_text: Click the Reports breadcrumb/header to refresh the reports list
rationale: If the popover persists or the list state is odd, refreshing the list context by re-selecting the Reports breadcrumb can reset the UI and clear overlays.
